subject: FW: A Reference
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, April 24, 2008 3:44 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: A Reference

Response re blue palace. 

----- Original Message -----
From: Tamvakakis Apostolos <ast@lamda-development.net>
To: Farkas, Andrew L.
Sent: Thu Apr 24 15:35:09 2008
Subject: Re: A Reference

Hi Andrew.the hotel is new and one of the best in greece. The owner is called SBOKOS and he is a fantstic person.The location is also great

----- Original Message -----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. <afarkas@islecap.com>
To: Tamvakakis Apostolos
Sent: Thu Apr 24 18:21:55 2008
Subject: A Reference

Hello, my friend! I hope all is well. I am still trying to find a good date for dubai. I suspect it will be mid may. In the meantime I need to ask a question: I have a very good friend and partner (billionaire money manager type) who wants to go to crete tomorrow to see the Blue Palace. He has asked me if this is worthwhile. Do you know anything about it?
